creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://www.freebsd.org/security/#model> there's a good example of a page that's not dated, however a date can be inferred from something within the page. 

<https://www.freebsd.org/internal/code-of-conduct/> is more obviously the type of page that should be dated. 

Anything policy-like, I reckon, should be dated. 

Thanks
